description_long: This is a classic hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a heavy, wedge-shaped metal head. The handle displays a natural wood grain texture, with a gentle ergonomic curve for improved grip and control. The axe head is forged from dark, weathered metal, with a broad cutting edge and a flat poll on the opposite side for striking. The transition between the handle and the head is seamless, suggesting a traditional wedged mounting style. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or branding. This tool is well-suited for chopping wood or similar tasks in urban or suburban environments such as parks, backyards, or garages.
description: A traditional hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a dark, wedge-shaped metal head, designed for chopping tasks. The tool has a utilitarian, weathered appearance.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from a three-quarter angle, highlighting the curved wooden handle and the broad, wedge-shaped metal blade.
description_view_1: A direct side view of the axe, showing the thin profile of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: The opposite three-quarter view, displaying the other side of the axe head and the full curvature of the handle.
description_view_3: A rear view, emphasizing the flat poll of the axe head and the straight, narrow handle profile.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with visible grain, ergonomic shape, oval cross-section, no additional grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Single wedge-shaped steel blade with a broad cutting edge and flat poll, no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting, blade fitted onto handle with a secure, friction-based join.
